title: Array declarations should include an explicit size specification
description: Array declarations should include an explicit size specificationAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misracertWhy is this an issue?More InfoIt is possible to declare an array without explicitly specifying its size, but using an explicit size declaration is clearer, and is therefore preferred.Noncompliant code exampleint arr1 [ ]; // Noncompliant; nothing specified int arr2 [ ] = { [0] = 1, [12] = 36, [4] = 93 }; // Noncompliant; highest index determines size. May be difficult to spot int pirate [ ] = { 2, 4, 8, 42, 501, 90210, 7, 1776 }; // Noncompliant; size is implicit, not explicitCompliant solutionint arr1 [10]; int arr2 [13] = { [0] = 1, [12] = 36, [4] = 93 }; int pirate [10] = { 2, 4, 8, 42, 501, 90210, 7, 1776 }; // Implicitly-assigned size was 8. D
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
int arr1 [ ];  // Noncompliant; nothing specified
int arr2 [ ] = { [0] = 1, [12] = 36, [4] = 93 }; // Noncompliant; highest index determines size. May be difficult to spot
int pirate [ ] = { 2, 4, 8, 42, 501, 90210, 7, 1776 }; // Noncompliant; size is implicit, not explicit

checks.message: Array declarations should include an explicit size specification
